mapper.sql: faq_id, contest_id, question, answer, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_contest_faq where faq_id = #{faqId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_contest_faq where contest_id = #{contestId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, faq_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_contest_faq set question = #{entity.question}, answer = #{entity.answer}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where faq_id = #{entity.faqId} and del_flag = '0'
